subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1914-05-02
subcodes.first_line: How cool is thy areesheh! Is this not better than the palace of the kings?... All the companions of our trips in different parts of the world have departed and only you and I are left!
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
